title: context7
summary:
Context7 MCP Server -- Up-to-date code documentation for LLMs and AI code editors 
 !Coverhttpsgithub.comupstashcontext7blobmasterpubliccover.png?rawtrue LLMs rely on outdated or generic information about the libraries you use. You get Context7 MCP pulls up-to-date, version-specific documentation and code examples straight from the source and places them directly into your prompt. Add use context7 to your prompt or set up a ruleadd-a-rule to auto-invoke txt
